canonical_question: How do I test demand signals — fake door tests, waitlist conversion, Kickstarter validation, concierge MVP methodology?
aliases: How to validate demand before building a product
Fake door test vs waitlist vs crowdfunding for startup validation
Landing page smoke test to measure customer interest
Concierge MVP and Wizard of Oz testing methodology
constraints: Never invest more than $500-2,000 in ad spend per demand test
Fake door tests in regulated industries can create compliance risk
Waitlist signup alone is a weak signal — conversion to paid is the real metric
Crowdfunding campaigns require 4-8 weeks of pre-launch audience building

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Already have paying customers and need to validate a new feature
Need a strategic framework for which validation method to use
Ready to build an MVP after validation

related_to.label: Qualitative validation to complement quantitative demand signals

inputs_needed.question: Which demand signal test should be run?
What is the user's technical skill level?
Does the user have an existing audience?
